/bin/zsh -lc 'nl -ba template/scripts/test_timeline_integration.py' in /Users/rokumasuda/.claude/plugins/supermovie
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""SuperMovie Phase 3-K integration smoke test (pure python).
     3	
     4	template/scripts/timeline.py + 3 script (voicevox_narration / build_slide_data /
     5	build_telop_data) の連鎖が破損していないか、engine / node_modules 不要で
     6	unit test する。Phase 3-J で導入した timeline.py の前提を壊す変更があれば
     7	失敗する。
     8	
     9	Usage:
    10	    python3 scripts/test_timeline_integration.py
    11	
    12	Exit code:
    13	    0 = 全 assertion pass
    14	    1 = 1 件以上 fail (assertion error)、stderr に詳細
    15	"""
    16	from __future__ import annotations
    17	
    18	import json
    19	import struct
    20	import sys
    21	import tempfile
    22	import wave
    23	from pathlib import Path
    24	
    25	SCRIPTS = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    26	sys.path.insert(0, str(SCRIPTS))
    27	
    28	import timeline  # noqa: E402
    29	
    30	
    31	def make_videoconfig_ts(fps: int) -> str:
    32	    return (
    33	        "export type VideoFormat = 'youtube' | 'short' | 'square';\n"
    34	        "export const FORMAT: VideoFormat = 'youtube';\n"
    35	        f"export const FPS = {fps};\n"
    36	        "export const SOURCE_DURATION_FRAMES = 1500;\n"
    37	        "export const VIDEO_FILE = 'main.mp4';\n"
    38	    )
    39	
    40	
    41	def write_synthetic_wav(path: Path, duration_sec: float, framerate: int = 22050) -> None:
    42	    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    43	    with wave.open(str(path), "wb") as w:
    44	        w.setnchannels(1)
    45	        w.setsampwidth(2)
    46	        w.setframerate(framerate)
    47	        n_frames = int(framerate * duration_sec)
    48	        w.writeframes(struct.pack("<%dh" % n_frames, *[0] * n_frames))
    49	
    50	
    51	def assert_eq(actual, expected, msg: str) -> None:
    52	    if actual != expected:
    53	        raise AssertionError(f"{msg}: expected {expected!r}, got {actual!r}")
    54	
    55	
    56	def assert_raises(callable_, exc_type, msg: str):
    57	    try:
    58	        callable_()
    59	    except exc_type:
    60	        return
    61	    raise AssertionError(f"{msg}: expected {exc_type.__name__} but no exception raised")
    62	
    63	
    64	def test_fps_consistency() -> None:
    65	    """3 script が timeline.read_video_config_fps を経由して同じ FPS を返す."""
    66	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    67	        proj = Path(tmp)
    68	        (proj / "src").mkdir()
    69	        (proj / "src" / "videoConfig.ts").write_text(make_videoconfig_ts(60))
    70	
    71	        # timeline 直読
    72	        assert_eq(timeline.read_video_config_fps(proj), 60, "timeline FPS read")
    73	
    74	        # malformed 検出 (FPS 行なし)
    75	        (proj / "src" / "videoConfig.ts").write_text("// no fps line\n")
    76	        assert_eq(
    77	            timeline.read_video_config_fps(proj, default=42),
    78	            42,
    79	            "malformed FPS fallback",
    80	        )
    81	
    82	        # FPS=0 を default に倒す
    83	        (proj / "src" / "videoConfig.ts").write_text(
    84	            "export const FPS = 0;\n"
    85	        )
    86	        assert_eq(timeline.read_video_config_fps(proj), timeline.DEFAULT_FPS, "FPS=0 fallback")
    87	
    88	
    89	def test_vad_schema_validation() -> None:
    90	    """VadSchemaError が部分破損を全て検出する."""
    91	    # 非 dict
    92	    assert_raises(
    93	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema("not dict"),
    94	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
    95	        "non-dict",
    96	    )
    97	    # speech_segments 非 list
    98	    assert_raises(
    99	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema({"speech_segments": "wrong"}),
   100	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
   101	        "speech_segments non-list",
   102	    )
   103	    # segment 非 dict
   104	    assert_raises(
   105	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema({"speech_segments": ["str"]}),
   106	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
   107	        "segment non-dict",
   108	    )
   109	    # start 型不正
   110	    assert_raises(
   111	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema(
   112	            {"speech_segments": [{"start": "bad", "end": 100}]}
   113	        ),
   114	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
   115	        "start non-numeric",
   116	    )
   117	    # end 欠落
   118	    assert_raises(
   119	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema({"speech_segments": [{"start": 0}]}),
   120	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
   121	        "end missing",
   122	    )
   123	    # start > end
   124	    assert_raises(
   125	        lambda: timeline.validate_vad_schema(
   126	            {"speech_segments": [{"start": 100, "end": 50}]}
   127	        ),
   128	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
   129	        "start > end",
   130	    )
   131	    # OK
   132	    timeline.validate_vad_schema(
   133	        {"speech_segments": [{"start": 0, "end": 1000}]}
   134	    )
   135	
   136	
   137	def test_ms_to_playback_frame() -> None:
   138	    # No cut: 直接 ms→frame
   139	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(0, 30, []), 0, "no-cut start")
   140	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(1000, 30, []), 30, "no-cut 1s")
   141	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(500, 30, []), 15, "no-cut 0.5s")
   142	
   143	    # With cut: gap removed
   144	    cut_segs = [
   145	        {"originalStartMs": 0, "originalEndMs": 500, "playbackStart": 0, "playbackEnd": 15},
   146	        {"originalStartMs": 1500, "originalEndMs": 3000, "playbackStart": 15, "playbackEnd": 60},
   147	    ]
   148	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(200, 30, cut_segs), 6, "cut seg0 200ms")
   149	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(1500, 30, cut_segs), 15, "cut seg1 start")
   150	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(2000, 30, cut_segs), 30, "cut seg1 +500ms")
   151	    # 800ms: gap (excluded)
   152	    assert_eq(timeline.ms_to_playback_frame(800, 30, cut_segs), None, "cut gap excluded")
   153	
   154	
   155	def test_load_cut_segments_fail_fast() -> None:
   156	    """fail_fast=True で部分破損を raise する."""
   157	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   158	        proj = Path(tmp)
   159	        (proj / "vad_result.json").write_text(
   160	            json.dumps({"speech_segments": [{"start": 100}]})  # end missing
   161	        )
   162	        # default fail_fast=False で []
   163	        assert_eq(timeline.load_cut_segments(proj, 30, fail_fast=False), [], "soft fail")
   164	        # fail_fast=True で raise
   165	        assert_raises(
   166	            lambda: timeline.load_cut_segments(proj, 30, fail_fast=True),
   167	            timeline.VadSchemaError,
   168	            "fail_fast raise",
   169	        )
   170	
   171	
   172	def test_transcript_segment_validation() -> None:
   173	    """validate_transcript_segment が壊れた transcript を検出する."""
   174	    # OK: timing なし (--script の chunk)
   175	    timeline.validate_transcript_segment({"text": "hi"}, 0)
   176	    # OK: 通常 transcript
   177	    timeline.validate_transcript_segment({"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 1000}, 0)
   178	    # NG: start > end
   179	    assert_raises(
   180	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segment(
   181	            {"text": "hi", "start": 1000, "end": 500}, 0
   182	        ),
   183	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   184	        "transcript start>end",
   185	    )
   186	    # NG: text 非 str
   187	    assert_raises(
   188	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segment({"text": 123}, 0),
   189	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   190	        "text non-str",
   191	    )
   192	    # NG: start 型不正
   193	    assert_raises(
   194	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segment(
   195	            {"text": "hi", "start": "bad"}, 0
   196	        ),
   197	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   198	        "start non-numeric",
   199	    )
   200	
   201	    # Phase 3-L (Codex Phase 3-J review Part B 推奨): require_timing=True で
   202	    # start/end 必須化、欠落 / None で raise。
   203	    assert_raises(
   204	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segment(
   205	            {"text": "hi"}, 0, require_timing=True
   206	        ),
   207	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   208	        "require_timing missing both",
   209	    )
   210	    assert_raises(
   211	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segment(
   212	            {"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": None}, 0, require_timing=True
   213	        ),
   214	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   215	        "require_timing end None",
   216	    )
   217	    # OK: require_timing=True + 両方 numeric
   218	    timeline.validate_transcript_segment(
   219	        {"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 1000}, 0, require_timing=True
   220	    )
   221	
   222	    # validate_transcript_segments 一括 helper
   223	    out = timeline.validate_transcript_segments(
   224	        [{"text": "a", "start": 0, "end": 100}, {"text": "b", "start": 100, "end": 200}],
   225	        require_timing=True,
   226	    )
   227	    assert_eq(len(out), 2, "validate_transcript_segments OK length")
   228	    # 非 list で raise
   229	    assert_raises(
   230	        lambda: timeline.validate_transcript_segments("not a list"),
   231	        timeline.TranscriptSegmentError,
   232	        "validate_transcript_segments non-list",
   233	    )
   234	
   235	
   236	def test_voicevox_collect_chunks_validation() -> None:
   237	    """voicevox_narration.collect_chunks が壊れた transcript で raise する."""
   238	    import voicevox_narration as vn
   239	
   240	    class Args:
   241	        script = None
   242	        script_json = None
   243	
   244	    bad = {"segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 100, "end": 50}]}
   245	    assert_raises(
   246	        lambda: vn.collect_chunks(Args(), bad),
   247	        vn.TranscriptSegmentError,
   248	        "voicevox start>end transcript",
   249	    )
   250	
   251	    good = {"segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 1000}]}
   252	    out = vn.collect_chunks(Args(), good)
   253	    assert_eq(len(out), 1, "voicevox good transcript len")
   254	    assert_eq(out[0]["sourceStartMs"], 0, "voicevox sourceStartMs")
   255	    assert_eq(out[0]["sourceEndMs"], 1000, "voicevox sourceEndMs")
   256	
   257	    # Codex Phase 3-J review P2 #1 反映: validate を `.get(...).strip()` 前に通す
   258	    # 非 dict segment → TranscriptSegmentError
   259	    assert_raises(
   260	        lambda: vn.collect_chunks(Args(), {"segments": ["not a dict"]}),
   261	        vn.TranscriptSegmentError,
   262	        "voicevox non-dict segment",
   263	    )
   264	    # segments 非 list → TranscriptSegmentError
   265	    assert_raises(
   266	        lambda: vn.collect_chunks(Args(), {"segments": "wrong"}),
   267	        vn.TranscriptSegmentError,
   268	        "voicevox non-list segments",
   269	    )
   270	    # text 非 str (int) → TranscriptSegmentError
   271	    assert_raises(
   272	        lambda: vn.collect_chunks(Args(), {"segments": [{"text": 123}]}),
   273	        vn.TranscriptSegmentError,
   274	        "voicevox text non-str",
   275	    )
   276	    # text=None は filter (空文字列と同じ扱い、空 list 返す)
   277	    assert_eq(
   278	        vn.collect_chunks(Args(), {"segments": [{"text": None, "start": 0, "end": 100}]}),
   279	        [],
   280	        "voicevox text=None filtered",
   281	    )
   282	
   283	
   284	def test_voicevox_write_order_narrationdata_before_wav() -> None:
   285	    """Phase 3-N race fix regression: write 順序 narrationData.ts → narration.wav.
   286	
   287	    旧順序 (narration.wav 先) では Studio hot-reload で legacy 経路に一瞬流れる
   288	    race があった (Codex CODEX_REVIEW_PHASE3N_AND_3O P2 #1)。新順序を保証する
   289	    ため、本 test は call order を直接 verify する:
   290	
   291	    1. main() を temp project + module-level state monkey-patch で実行
   292	    2. concat_wavs_atomic を「narrationData.ts 存在を assert する mock」で
   293	       置換、call 時点で narrationData.ts populated でないなら raise
   294	    3. 旧順序に戻れば assert で必ず落ちる
   295	
   296	    Codex Phase 3-O fix re-review P2 #2 反映 (旧 test は逆順でも通る)。
   297	    """
   298	    import voicevox_narration as vn
   299	
   300	    state = {
   301	        "PROJ": vn.PROJ,
   302	        "NARRATION_DIR": vn.NARRATION_DIR,
   303	        "NARRATION_DATA_TS": vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS,
   304	        "CHUNK_META_JSON": vn.CHUNK_META_JSON,
   305	        "NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV": vn.NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV,
   306	    }
   307	    original_concat = vn.concat_wavs_atomic
   308	    original_check_engine = vn.check_engine
   309	    original_synthesize = vn.synthesize
   310	
   311	    try:
   312	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   313	            proj = Path(tmp)
   314	            vn.PROJ = proj
   315	            vn.NARRATION_DIR = proj / "public" / "narration"
   316	            vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS = proj / "src" / "Narration" / "narrationData.ts"
   317	            vn.CHUNK_META_JSON = vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_meta.json"
   318	            vn.NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV = proj / "public" / "narration.wav"
   319	            (proj / "src" / "Narration").mkdir(parents=True)
   320	            (proj / "src" / "videoConfig.ts").write_text(
   321	                make_videoconfig_ts(30), encoding="utf-8"
   322	            )
   323	            # transcript で 1 chunk 用意
   324	            (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   325	                json.dumps(
   326	                    {"segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 1000}]}
   327	                ),
   328	                encoding="utf-8",
   329	            )
   330	
   331	            # engine OK + synthesize stub (synthetic 22050Hz mono WAV bytes)
   332	            import wave
   333	            import io
   334	
   335	            buf = io.BytesIO()
   336	            with wave.open(buf, "wb") as w:
   337	                w.setnchannels(1)
   338	                w.setsampwidth(2)
   339	                w.setframerate(22050)
   340	                import struct
   341	                w.writeframes(struct.pack("<22050h", *([0] * 22050)))
   342	            wav_bytes = buf.getvalue()
   343	
   344	            vn.check_engine = lambda: (True, "0.0.0-test")
   345	            vn.synthesize = lambda text, speaker: wav_bytes
   346	
   347	            # concat_wavs_atomic を「narrationData.ts populated を assert + raise」に
   348	            order_check_log = []
   349	
   350	            def assert_concat_after_narrationdata(wavs, out_path):
   351	                # narrationData.ts 存在 + 空 array でないことを確認
   352	                if not vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS.exists():
   353	                    order_check_log.append("FAIL: narrationData.ts not created before concat")
   354	                    raise RuntimeError("write order regression: narrationData.ts missing")
   355	                content = vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   356	                if "narration/chunk_000.wav" not in content:
   357	                    order_check_log.append(
   358	                        f"FAIL: narrationData.ts not populated before concat: {content[:100]}"
   359	                    )
   360	                    raise RuntimeError("write order regression: narrationData.ts empty")
   361	                order_check_log.append("OK: narrationData.ts populated before concat")
   362	                # 失敗を演じて rollback path を起動 (P1 fix の Exception catch)
   363	                raise PermissionError("simulated permission error")
   364	
   365	            vn.concat_wavs_atomic = assert_concat_after_narrationdata
   366	
   367	            # main() を実行、concat で失敗 → exit 6 期待
   368	            import sys as _sys
   369	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   370	            _sys.argv = ["voicevox_narration.py"]
   371	            try:
   372	                ret = vn.main()
   373	            finally:
   374	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   375	
   376	            # call order assertion
   377	            if not order_check_log:
   378	                raise AssertionError("concat mock not invoked (main() flow regression)")
   379	            if "OK:" not in order_check_log[0]:
   380	                raise AssertionError(
   381	                    f"write order regression detected: {order_check_log}"
   382	                )
   383	            # exit code: rollback path の return 6 を期待 (Codex P1 fix が動作)
   384	            assert_eq(ret, 6, "concat failure → exit 6 (P1 rollback)")
   385	            # rollback 後: narrationData.ts は empty に戻り、chunks 削除済み
   386	            content = vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   387	            if "export const narrationData: NarrationSegment[] = []" not in content:
   388	                raise AssertionError(
   389	                    f"rollback failed: narrationData.ts not empty: {content[:100]}"
   390	                )
   391	            chunk_files = list(vn.NARRATION_DIR.glob("chunk_*.wav"))
   392	            if chunk_files:
   393	                raise AssertionError(f"rollback failed: chunks left: {chunk_files}")
   394	    finally:
   395	        for k, v in state.items():
   396	            setattr(vn, k, v)
   397	        vn.concat_wavs_atomic = original_concat
   398	        vn.check_engine = original_check_engine
   399	        vn.synthesize = original_synthesize
   400	
   401	
   402	def test_voicevox_write_narration_data_alignment() -> None:
   403	    """transcript timing alignment が cut-aware で正しく動く end-to-end."""
   404	    import voicevox_narration as vn
   405	
   406	    # Codex Phase 3-L re-review P3 #2 反映: module-level state を try/finally で
   407	    # restore (test 間 leak 防止、後続 voicevox test 追加時の汚染回避)。
   408	    original_proj = vn.PROJ
   409	    original_narration_dir = vn.NARRATION_DIR
   410	    original_narration_data_ts = vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS
   411	    original_chunk_meta_json = vn.CHUNK_META_JSON
   412	    original_narration_legacy_wav = vn.NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV
   413	
   414	    try:
   415	        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   416	            proj = Path(tmp)
   417	            vn.PROJ = proj
   418	            vn.NARRATION_DIR = proj / "public" / "narration"
   419	            vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS = proj / "src" / "Narration" / "narrationData.ts"
   420	            vn.CHUNK_META_JSON = vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_meta.json"
   421	            vn.NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV = proj / "public" / "narration.wav"
   422	            vn.NARRATION_DIR.mkdir(parents=True)
   423	            vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS.parent.mkdir(parents=True)
   424	
   425	            write_synthetic_wav(vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_000.wav", 1.0)
   426	            write_synthetic_wav(vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_001.wav", 0.5)
   427	
   428	            # No cut, transcript timing 0ms と 1000ms
   429	            chunks_data = [
   430	                (vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_000.wav", "first", 0, 1000),
   431	                (vn.NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_001.wav", "second", 1000, 1500),
   432	            ]
   433	            segments, ts_path, meta_path = vn.write_narration_data(chunks_data, 30, [])
   434	            assert_eq(segments[0]["startFrame"], 0, "chunk0 startFrame")
   435	            assert_eq(segments[0]["durationInFrames"], 30, "chunk0 dur")
   436	            assert_eq(segments[0]["timing_source"], "transcript_aligned", "chunk0 source")
   437	            assert_eq(segments[1]["startFrame"], 30, "chunk1 startFrame (1000ms*30fps)")
   438	
   439	            # Verify TS file is valid
   440	            ts = ts_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   441	            assert "narrationData" in ts
   442	            assert "sourceStartMs: 0" in ts
   443	            assert "sourceStartMs: 1000" in ts
   444	    finally:
   445	        vn.PROJ = original_proj
   446	        vn.NARRATION_DIR = original_narration_dir
   447	        vn.NARRATION_DATA_TS = original_narration_data_ts
   448	        vn.CHUNK_META_JSON = original_chunk_meta_json
   449	        vn.NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV = original_narration_legacy_wav
   450	
   451	
   452	def _setup_temp_project(tmp: Path, fps: int = 30) -> Path:
   453	    """build_slide / build_telop が読む最小ファイルを temp project に揃える."""
   454	    (tmp / "src").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   455	    (tmp / "src" / "videoConfig.ts").write_text(make_videoconfig_ts(fps))
   456	    (tmp / "src" / "Slides").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   457	    (tmp / "src" / "テロップテンプレート").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   458	    return tmp
   459	
   460	
   461	def test_build_slide_data_main_e2e() -> None:
   462	    """build_slide_data.py を temp project で main() 実行、SlideData.ts 出力を検証.
   463	
   464	    Codex Phase 3-L 推奨 vi 反映: integration_smoke を build_slide にも展開。
   465	    monkey-patch (PROJ / FPS) で in-process 実行。
   466	    """
   467	    import importlib
   468	    import build_slide_data as bsd
   469	
   470	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   471	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
   472	        # 通常 transcript: 2 segments
   473	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   474	            json.dumps(
   475	                {
   476	                    "duration_ms": 5000,
   477	                    "text": "test",
   478	                    "segments": [
   479	                        {"text": "hello", "start": 0, "end": 2000},
   480	                        {"text": "world", "start": 2000, "end": 4000},
   481	                    ],
   482	                    "words": [],
   483	                }
   484	            ),
   485	            encoding="utf-8",
   486	        )
   487	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   488	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロフェッショナル"}),
   489	            encoding="utf-8",
   490	        )
   491	
   492	        # monkey-patch PROJ + FPS (import time に固定されるため re-binding 必要)
   493	        original_proj = bsd.PROJ
   494	        original_fps = bsd.FPS
   495	        bsd.PROJ = proj
   496	        bsd.FPS = 30
   497	        try:
   498	            # main() を直接呼出 (引数は空 → topic mode default)
   499	            import sys as _sys
   500	
   501	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   502	            _sys.argv = ["build_slide_data.py"]
   503	            try:
   504	                bsd.main()
   505	            finally:
   506	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   507	
   508	            # slideData.ts が生成されたか
   509	            slide_ts = proj / "src" / "Slides" / "slideData.ts"
   510	            if not slide_ts.exists():
   511	                raise AssertionError(f"slideData.ts not generated at {slide_ts}")
   512	            content = slide_ts.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   513	            if "slideData" not in content:
   514	                raise AssertionError(f"slideData.ts does not export slideData: {content[:100]}")
   515	        finally:
   516	            bsd.PROJ = original_proj
   517	            bsd.FPS = original_fps
   518	
   519	
   520	def test_build_slide_data_validates_bad_transcript() -> None:
   521	    """build_slide_data.py が壊れた transcript で SystemExit する."""
   522	    import build_slide_data as bsd
   523	
   524	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   525	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
   526	        # 壊れた transcript: start > end
   527	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   528	            json.dumps(
   529	                {
   530	                    "segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 1000, "end": 500}],
   531	                    "words": [],
   532	                }
   533	            ),
   534	            encoding="utf-8",
   535	        )
   536	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   537	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロフェッショナル"}),
   538	            encoding="utf-8",
   539	        )
   540	
   541	        original_proj = bsd.PROJ
   542	        bsd.PROJ = proj
   543	        try:
   544	            import sys as _sys
   545	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   546	            _sys.argv = ["build_slide_data.py"]
   547	            try:
   548	                bsd.main()
   549	                raise AssertionError("build_slide_data should fail with bad transcript")
   550	            except SystemExit as e:
   551	                # 期待: validation error message
   552	                msg = str(e)
   553	                if "transcript validation failed" not in msg:
   554	                    raise AssertionError(f"Expected validation error, got: {msg}")
   555	            finally:
   556	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   557	        finally:
   558	            bsd.PROJ = original_proj
   559	
   560	
   561	def test_build_telop_data_main_e2e() -> None:
   562	    """build_telop_data.py を temp project で main() 実行、call_budoux stub.
   563	
   564	    Codex Phase 3-L 推奨 vi 拡張 (Phase 3-M 候補 i): build_telop も e2e。
   565	    Node 依存の budoux_split.mjs は deterministic stub に差し替え。
   566	    """
   567	    import build_telop_data as btd
   568	
   569	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   570	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
   571	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   572	            json.dumps(
   573	                {
   574	                    "duration_ms": 5000,
   575	                    "text": "test",
   576	                    "segments": [
   577	                        {"text": "こんにちは世界", "start": 0, "end": 2000},
   578	                        {"text": "さようなら空", "start": 2000, "end": 4000},
   579	                    ],
   580	                    "words": [],
   581	                }
   582	            ),
   583	            encoding="utf-8",
   584	        )
   585	        (proj / "vad_result.json").write_text(
   586	            json.dumps(
   587	                {"speech_segments": [{"start": 0, "end": 4000}]}
   588	            ),
   589	            encoding="utf-8",
   590	        )
   591	
   592	        # call_budoux stub: text を 4文字毎に分割した phrases に変換
   593	        def stub_call_budoux(seg_texts):
   594	            return [
   595	                [t[i : i + 4] for i in range(0, len(t), 4)] or [t]
   596	                for t in seg_texts
   597	            ]
   598	
   599	        original_proj = btd.PROJ
   600	        original_call = btd.call_budoux
   601	        btd.PROJ = proj
   602	        btd.call_budoux = stub_call_budoux
   603	        try:
   604	            import sys as _sys
   605	
   606	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   607	            _sys.argv = ["build_telop_data.py"]
   608	            try:
   609	                btd.main()
   610	            finally:
   611	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   612	            # telopData.ts が生成されたか
   613	            telop_ts = proj / "src" / "テロップテンプレート" / "telopData.ts"
   614	            if not telop_ts.exists():
   615	                raise AssertionError(f"telopData.ts not generated at {telop_ts}")
   616	            content = telop_ts.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   617	            if "telopData" not in content:
   618	                raise AssertionError(
   619	                    f"telopData.ts does not export telopData: {content[:100]}"
   620	                )
   621	        finally:
   622	            btd.PROJ = original_proj
   623	            btd.call_budoux = original_call
   624	
   625	
   626	def test_build_telop_data_validates_bad_transcript() -> None:
   627	    """build_telop_data.py が壊れた transcript で SystemExit する."""
   628	    import build_telop_data as btd
   629	
   630	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   631	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
   632	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   633	            json.dumps(
   634	                {
   635	                    "segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 1000, "end": 500}],
   636	                    "words": [],
   637	                }
   638	            ),
   639	            encoding="utf-8",
   640	        )
   641	        (proj / "vad_result.json").write_text(
   642	            json.dumps({"speech_segments": [{"start": 0, "end": 1000}]}),
   643	            encoding="utf-8",
   644	        )
   645	
   646	        original_proj = btd.PROJ
   647	        original_call = btd.call_budoux
   648	        btd.PROJ = proj
   649	        # call_budoux stub (validation 前で raise されるので invoke されない想定)
   650	        btd.call_budoux = lambda x: [["dummy"] for _ in x]
   651	        try:
   652	            import sys as _sys
   653	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   654	            _sys.argv = ["build_telop_data.py"]
   655	            try:
   656	                btd.main()
   657	                raise AssertionError(
   658	                    "build_telop_data should fail with bad transcript"
   659	                )
   660	            except SystemExit as e:
   661	                msg = str(e)
   662	                if "transcript validation failed" not in msg:
   663	                    raise AssertionError(f"Expected validation error, got: {msg}")
   664	            finally:
   665	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   666	        finally:
   667	            btd.PROJ = original_proj
   668	            btd.call_budoux = original_call

   724	def test_generate_slide_plan_api_mock_success() -> None:
   725	    """generate_slide_plan API mock: valid response → slide_plan.json 生成.
   726	
   727	    Codex Phase 3-M cand iii の残置部分 (urllib mock + valid response 検証)。
   728	    """
   729	    import generate_slide_plan as gsp
   730	    import os as _os
   731	    import urllib.request as _urlreq
   732	
   733	    fake_plan = {
   734	        "version": gsp.PLAN_VERSION,
   735	        "slides": [
   736	            {
   737	                "id": 1,
   738	                "startWordIndex": 0,
   739	                "endWordIndex": 0,
   740	                "title": "テスト",
   741	                "bullets": [],
   742	                "align": "left",
   743	            }
   744	        ],
   745	    }
   746	    fake_response_body = json.dumps(
   747	        {"content": [{"type": "text", "text": json.dumps(fake_plan, ensure_ascii=False)}]}
   748	    ).encode("utf-8")
   749	
   750	    class FakeResponse:
   751	        def __init__(self, body):
   752	            self._body = body
   753	
   754	        def __enter__(self):
   755	            return self
   756	
   757	        def __exit__(self, *_args):
   758	            pass
   759	
   760	        def read(self):
   761	            return self._body
   762	
   763	    def mock_urlopen(req, timeout=60):
   764	        return FakeResponse(fake_response_body)
   765	
   766	    original_urlopen = _urlreq.urlopen
   767	    original_proj = gsp.PROJ
   768	    original_api_key = _os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY")  # Codex P2 #2 反映
   769	
   770	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   771	        proj = Path(tmp)
   772	        gsp.PROJ = proj
   773	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   774	            json.dumps(
   775	                {
   776	                    "words": [{"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 100}],
   777	                    "segments": [{"text": "hi", "start": 0, "end": 100}],
   778	                }
   779	            ),
   780	            encoding="utf-8",
   781	        )
   782	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   783	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロ"}),
   784	            encoding="utf-8",
   785	        )
   786	
   787	        _os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"] = "fake-key"
   788	        _urlreq.urlopen = mock_urlopen
   789	        try:
   790	            import sys as _sys
   791	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   792	            output_path = proj / "slide_plan.json"
   793	            _sys.argv = ["generate_slide_plan.py", "--output", str(output_path)]
   794	            try:
   795	                ret = gsp.main()
   796	                assert_eq(ret, 0, "API mock success exit 0")
   797	                if not output_path.exists():
   798	                    raise AssertionError(f"slide_plan.json not generated at {output_path}")
   799	                plan = json.loads(output_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   800	                assert_eq(plan["version"], gsp.PLAN_VERSION, "plan version")
   801	                assert_eq(len(plan["slides"]), 1, "plan slides count")
   802	            finally:
   803	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   804	        finally:
   805	            if original_api_key is None:
   806	                _os.environ.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
   807	            else:
   808	                _os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"] = original_api_key
   809	            _urlreq.urlopen = original_urlopen
   810	            gsp.PROJ = original_proj

   813	def test_generate_slide_plan_api_http_error() -> None:
   814	    """generate_slide_plan API mock: HTTP error → exit 4."""
   815	    import generate_slide_plan as gsp
   816	    import os as _os
   817	    import urllib.error as _urlerr
   818	    import urllib.request as _urlreq
   819	    from io import BytesIO
   820	
   821	    def mock_urlopen_http_error(req, timeout=60):
   822	        raise _urlerr.HTTPError(
   823	            "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
   824	            429,
   825	            "Rate Limit",
   826	            {},
   827	            BytesIO(b'{"error": {"type": "rate_limit_error"}}'),
   828	        )
   829	
   830	    original_urlopen = _urlreq.urlopen
   831	    original_proj = gsp.PROJ
   832	    original_api_key = _os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY")  # Codex P2 #2 反映
   833	
   834	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   835	        proj = Path(tmp)
   836	        gsp.PROJ = proj
   837	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   838	            json.dumps({"words": [], "segments": []}),
   839	            encoding="utf-8",
   840	        )
   841	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   842	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロ"}),
   843	            encoding="utf-8",
   844	        )
   845	        _os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"] = "fake-key"
   846	        _urlreq.urlopen = mock_urlopen_http_error
   847	        try:
   848	            import sys as _sys
   849	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   850	            _sys.argv = ["generate_slide_plan.py"]
   851	            try:
   852	                ret = gsp.main()
   853	                assert_eq(ret, 4, "API HTTP error → exit 4")
   854	            finally:
   855	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   856	        finally:
   857	            if original_api_key is None:
   858	                _os.environ.pop("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", None)
   859	            else:
   860	                _os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"] = original_api_key
   861	            _urlreq.urlopen = original_urlopen
   862	            gsp.PROJ = original_proj

   865	def test_generate_slide_plan_api_invalid_json() -> None:

   870

   873	    ).encode("utf-8")

   876	        def __init__(self, body):
   877	            self._body = body
   878	
   879	        def __enter__(self):
   880	            return self
   881	
   882	        def __exit__(self, *_args):
   883	            pass
   884	
   885	        def read(self):
   886	            return self._body
   887

   889	        return FakeResponse(invalid_response)
   890

   892	    original_proj = gsp.PROJ
   893	    original_api_key = _os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY")  # Codex P2 #2 反映

   896	        proj = Path(tmp)
   897	        gsp.PROJ = proj
   898	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   899	            json.dumps({"words": [], "segments": []}),
   900	            encoding="utf-8",
   901	        )
   902	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   903	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロ"}),
   904	            encoding="utf-8",
   905	        )
   906	        _os.environ["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"] = "fake-key"
   907	        _urlreq.urlopen = mock_urlopen

   911	            _sys.argv = ["generate_slide_plan.py"]

   922	            _urlreq.urlopen = original_urlopen

   926	def test_build_slide_data_plan_validation_fallback() -> None:
   927	    """build_slide_data --plan で validate 失敗 → deterministic fallback (default).
   928	
   929	    Codex Phase 3-M review P2 #3 反映: API mock の出口に build_slide_data
   930	    を繋いで schema validation 経路まで踏む integration test。
   931	    """
   932	    import build_slide_data as bsd
   933	
   934	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
   935	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
   936	        # 通常 transcript
   937	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
   938	            json.dumps(
   939	                {
   940	                    "duration_ms": 4000,
   941	                    "text": "test",
   942	                    "segments": [
   943	                        {"text": "hello", "start": 0, "end": 2000},
   944	                        {"text": "world", "start": 2000, "end": 4000},
   945	                    ],
   946	                    "words": [
   947	                        {"text": "hello", "start": 0, "end": 1000},
   948	                        {"text": "world", "start": 2000, "end": 3000},
   949	                    ],
   950	                }
   951	            ),
   952	            encoding="utf-8",
   953	        )
   954	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
   955	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロフェッショナル"}),
   956	            encoding="utf-8",
   957	        )
   958	        # 壊れた slide_plan: 必須 version 欠落
   959	        bad_plan = {
   960	            "slides": [
   961	                {
   962	                    "id": 1,
   963	                    "startWordIndex": 0,
   964	                    "endWordIndex": 1,
   965	                    "title": "test",
   966	                    "bullets": [],
   967	                    "align": "left",
   968	                }
   969	            ]
   970	        }
   971	        plan_path = proj / "bad_plan.json"
   972	        plan_path.write_text(json.dumps(bad_plan), encoding="utf-8")
   973	
   974	        original_proj = bsd.PROJ
   975	        bsd.PROJ = proj
   976	        try:
   977	            import sys as _sys
   978	            old_argv = _sys.argv
   979	            _sys.argv = [
   980	                "build_slide_data.py",
   981	                "--plan",
   982	                str(plan_path),
   983	                # default: validation 失敗で WARN + deterministic fallback
   984	            ]
   985	            try:
   986	                bsd.main()
   987	                # fallback 経路: deterministic で slideData.ts 生成
   988	                slide_ts = proj / "src" / "Slides" / "slideData.ts"
   989	                if not slide_ts.exists():
   990	                    raise AssertionError(
   991	                        f"slideData.ts not generated (fallback expected): {slide_ts}"
   992	                    )
   993	            finally:
   994	                _sys.argv = old_argv
   995	        finally:
   996	            bsd.PROJ = original_proj
   997	
   998	
   999	def test_build_slide_data_plan_strict_failure() -> None:
  1000	    """build_slide_data --plan + --strict-plan で validate 失敗 → SystemExit 2."""
  1001	    import build_slide_data as bsd
  1002	
  1003	    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
  1004	        proj = _setup_temp_project(Path(tmp))
  1005	        (proj / "transcript_fixed.json").write_text(
  1006	            json.dumps(
  1007	                {
  1008	                    "duration_ms": 2000,
  1009	                    "text": "test",
  1010	                    "segments": [{"text": "hello", "start": 0, "end": 2000}],
  1011	                    "words": [{"text": "hello", "start": 0, "end": 1000}],
  1012	                }
  1013	            ),
  1014	            encoding="utf-8",
  1015	        )
  1016	        (proj / "project-config.json").write_text(
  1017	            json.dumps({"format": "short", "tone": "プロ"}),
  1018	            encoding="utf-8",
  1019	        )
  1020	        # 壊れた plan: version 欠落
  1021	        bad_plan = {"slides": []}
  1022	        plan_path = proj / "bad_plan.json"
  1023	        plan_path.write_text(json.dumps(bad_plan), encoding="utf-8")
  1024	
  1025	        original_proj = bsd.PROJ
  1026	        bsd.PROJ = proj
  1027	        try:
  1028	            import sys as _sys
  1029	            old_argv = _sys.argv
  1030	            _sys.argv = [
  1031	                "build_slide_data.py",
  1032	                "--plan",
  1033	                str(plan_path),
  1034	                "--strict-plan",
  1035	            ]
  1036	            try:
  1037	                bsd.main()
  1038	                raise AssertionError(
  1039	                    "build_slide_data --strict-plan should fail with bad plan"
  1040	                )
  1041	            except SystemExit as e:
  1042	                # exit code 2 期待 (strict-plan + validation error)
  1043	                code = e.code if e.code is not None else 0
  1044	                assert_eq(code, 2, "strict-plan validation failure → exit 2")
  1045	            finally:
  1046	                _sys.argv = old_argv
  1047	        finally:
  1048	            bsd.PROJ = original_proj
  1049	
  1050	
  1051	def test_build_scripts_wiring() -> None:
  1052	    """build_slide_data / build_telop_data が timeline 経由で正しく wire されている."""
  1053	    import importlib
  1054	    bsd = importlib.import_module("build_slide_data")
  1055	    btd = importlib.import_module("build_telop_data")
  1056	
  1057	    # FPS が videoConfig.ts から読まれている (Phase 3-J 統合確認)
  1058	    if bsd.FPS <= 0:
  1059	        raise AssertionError(f"build_slide_data FPS should be positive, got {bsd.FPS}")
  1060	    if btd.FPS <= 0:
  1061	        raise AssertionError(f"build_telop_data FPS should be positive, got {btd.FPS}")
  1062	
  1063	    # validate_transcript_segment が timeline から wire されている
  1064	    if bsd.validate_transcript_segment is None:
  1065	        raise AssertionError("build_slide_data should import validate_transcript_segment")
  1066	    if btd.validate_transcript_segment is None:
  1067	        raise AssertionError("build_telop_data should import validate_transcript_segment")
  1068	
  1069	    # build_slide_data の cut helper wrapper が timeline 経由で動く
  1070	    cuts = bsd.build_cut_segments_from_vad(
  1071	        {"speech_segments": [{"start": 0, "end": 1000}]}
  1072	    )
  1073	    assert_eq(len(cuts), 1, "bsd.build_cut_segments_from_vad len")
  1074	    assert_eq(cuts[0]["originalStartMs"], 0, "bsd cuts[0] originalStartMs")
  1075	
  1076	    # build_telop_data の cut helper も validate_vad_schema 経由
  1077	    cuts_t = btd.build_cut_segments_from_vad(
  1078	        {"speech_segments": [{"start": 0, "end": 1000}]}
  1079	    )
  1080	    assert_eq(len(cuts_t), 1, "btd.build_cut_segments_from_vad len")
  1081	
  1082	    # 壊れた VAD で raise (3 script で挙動統一の確認)
  1083	    bad_vad = {"speech_segments": [{"start": 100, "end": 50}]}
  1084	    assert_raises(
  1085	        lambda: bsd.build_cut_segments_from_vad(bad_vad),
  1086	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
  1087	        "bsd raises VadSchemaError",
  1088	    )
  1089	    assert_raises(
  1090	        lambda: btd.build_cut_segments_from_vad(bad_vad),
  1091	        timeline.VadSchemaError,
  1092	        "btd raises VadSchemaError",
  1093	    )
  1094	
  1095	
  1096	def main() -> int:
  1097	    tests = [
  1098	        test_fps_consistency,
  1099	        test_vad_schema_validation,
  1100	        test_ms_to_playback_frame,
  1101	        test_load_cut_segments_fail_fast,
  1102	        test_transcript_segment_validation,
  1103	        test_voicevox_collect_chunks_validation,
  1104	        test_voicevox_write_narration_data_alignment,
  1105	        test_voicevox_write_order_narrationdata_before_wav,
  1106	        test_build_scripts_wiring,
  1107	        test_build_slide_data_main_e2e,
  1108	        test_build_slide_data_validates_bad_transcript,
  1109	        test_build_telop_data_main_e2e,
  1110	        test_build_telop_data_validates_bad_transcript,
  1111	        test_generate_slide_plan_skip_no_api_key,
  1112	        test_generate_slide_plan_missing_inputs,
  1113	        test_generate_slide_plan_api_mock_success,
  1114	        test_generate_slide_plan_api_http_error,
  1115	        test_generate_slide_plan_api_invalid_json,
  1116	        test_build_slide_data_plan_validation_fallback,
  1117	        test_build_slide_data_plan_strict_failure,
  1118	    ]
  1119	    failed = []
  1120	    for t in tests:
  1121	        name = t.__name__
  1122	        try:
  1123	            t()
  1124	            print(f"  [OK]   {name}")
  1125	        except AssertionError as e:
  1126	            failed.append((name, str(e)))
  1127	            print(f"  [FAIL] {name}: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
  1128	        except Exception as e:
  1129	            failed.append((name, f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"))
  1130	            print(f"  [ERR]  {name}: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
  1131	
  1132	    total = len(tests)
  1133	    print(f"\nResult: {total - len(failed)}/{total} pass, {len(failed)} fail")
  1134	    if failed:
  1135	        for name, msg in failed:
  1136	            print(f"  - {name}: {msg}", file=sys.stderr)
  1137	    return 0 if not failed else 1
  1138	
  1139	
  1140	if __name__ == "__main__":
  1141	    sys.exit(main())

Author: 増田朗空 <rokumasuda@RokuMacBook-Pro-M5.local>
Date:   Tue May 5 06:18:33 2026 +0900

    feat(telop): any 警告ゼロ化 (Phase 3-R / Codex 推奨 B4)
    
    Codex CODEX_RESUME_PHASE3R 推奨 B4 (any 警告ゼロ化) を完封実装。
    旧: 9 warnings (Telop.tsx の `(font as any).fillGradient` 等の escape) +
        2 errors (tsc unused vars、別 commit で fix 済み)
    新: 0 warnings + 0 errors → npm run lint exit 0
    
    新規:
    - template/src/テロップテンプレート/telopConfigTypes.ts:
      TelopFontConfig / TelopTextShadowConfig / TelopTextStrokeConfig /
      TelopBackgroundConfig / TelopPositionConfig / TelopHighlightConfig /
      TelopStyleConfig / TelopAnimationSpring / TelopAnimationConfig
      各 interface で telopStyles.ts の heterogeneous template / animation を
      共通型として表現、optional 欄 (fillGradient / opacity / charDelay 等) は
      `?` で declaration、escape 不要に。
    
    修正 (Telop.tsx):
    - import で telopConfigTypes を追加
    - CharByCharText props 型: `config: any, animation: any`
      → `config: TelopStyleConfig, animation: TelopAnimationConfig`
    - `(animation as any).charDelay` → `animation.charDelay ?? 2`
    - `(font as any).fillGradient` → `font.fillGradient` (3 箇所)
    - `(animation as any).slideDirection` → `animation.slideDirection`
    - `(textStroke as any).gradient` → `textStroke.gradient`
    - `(font as any).opacity` → `font.opacity ?? 1`
    - 主 component で `getTemplateConfig` 結果を `const baseConfig: TelopStyleConfig`
      と explicit annotate (literal union → 共通 interface に widening)、optional
      fillGradient/opacity 等の safe access を有効化
    
    検証 (Bash 実測、template/node_modules 入手済 with custom cache):
    - npm run lint → exit 0、stdout 空 (eslint warnings 0 + tsc errors 0)
    
    これで Roku 環境で `npm run test` / `npm run lint` 完全 pass、
    check_release_ready.sh の TS compile gate も SKIP → OK 経路に進む。
    Codex Phase 3-R 推奨 B4 完封、次 review cycle へ。
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 import React from 'react';

+import { useCurrentFrame, interpolate, spring, useVideoConfig } from 'remotion';
 import type { TelopSegment } from './telopTypes';
+import type {
+  TelopAnimationConfig,
+  TelopStyleConfig,
+} from './telopConfigTypes';
 import { TELOP_CONFIG } from '../videoConfig';
 import {
   template1_gradient,
   template2_purpleStroke,
   template3_gradientText,
   template4_negative,
   template4_negative_v2,
   template6_whiteGradientText,
   animation_none,
   animation_slideIn,
   animation_fadeOnly,
   animation_slideFromLeft,
   animation_fadeBlurFromBottom,
   animation_slideLeftFadeBlur,
   animation_fadeFromRight,
   animation_fadeFromLeft,
   animation_charByChar,
 } from './telopStyles';
 
 interface TelopProps {
   segment: TelopSegment;
 }
 
 // ネガティブテンプレートをIDに基づいてランダム選択
 const getNegativeTemplate = (id: number) => {
   return id % 2 === 0 ? template4_negative : template4_negative_v2;
 };
 
 // 強調テンプレートをIDに基づいてランダム選択（T1 or T6）
 const getEmphasisTemplate = (id: number) => {
   return id % 2 === 0 ? template1_gradient : template6_whiteGradientText;
 };
 
 // styleからテンプレートを選択
 const getTemplateConfig = (segment: TelopSegment) => {
   // 明示的にtemplateが指定されている場合
   if (segment.template === 1) return template1_gradient;
   if (segment.template === 2) return template2_purpleStroke;
   if (segment.template === 3) return template3_gradientText;
   if (segment.template === 4) return template4_negative;
   if (segment.template === 5) return template4_negative_v2;
   if (segment.template === 6) return template6_whiteGradientText;
 
   // styleから自動マッピング
   switch (segment.style) {
     case 'success':
       return template3_gradientText; // ポイント
     case 'warning':
       return getNegativeTemplate(segment.id); // ネガティブ（ランダム）
     case 'emphasis':
       return getEmphasisTemplate(segment.id); // 強調（T1/T6ランダム）
     default:
       return template2_purpleStroke; // 基本
   }
 };
 
 // IDベースでアニメーションをばらけさせる（fadeOnly用）
 // 右からのアニメーションは除外
 const getVariedAnimation = (id: number) => {
   const animations = [
-    animation_fadeOnly,           // 0: フェードのみ
-    animation_fadeFromLeft,       // 1: 左からフェードイン
-    animation_fadeOnly,           // 2: フェードのみ
-    animation_slideFromLeft,      // 3: 左からスライドイン
-    animation_fadeOnly,           // 4: フェードのみ
-    animation_slideLeftFadeBlur,  // 5: 左スライド+フェード+ブラー
+    animation_fadeOnly, // 0: フェードのみ
+    animation_fadeFromLeft, // 1: 左からフェードイン
+    animation_fadeOnly, // 2: フェードのみ
+    animation_slideFromLeft, // 3: 左からスライドイン
+    animation_fadeOnly, // 4: フェードのみ
+    animation_slideLeftFadeBlur, // 5: 左スライド+フェード+ブラー
   ];
   return animations[id % animations.length];
 };
 
 // アニメーションテンプレートを選択
 // デフォルトはアニメーションなし。後から変更可能
 const getAnimationConfig = (segment: TelopSegment) => {
   // 明示的にslideInが指定されている場合（warning/emphasisなど）
   if (segment.animation === 'slideIn') return animation_slideIn;
 
   // fadeOnlyはIDベースでバリエーションを付ける
   if (segment.animation === 'fadeOnly') return getVariedAnimation(segment.id);
 
   // その他の明示的な指定
   if (segment.animation === 'slideFromLeft') return animation_slideFromLeft;
-  if (segment.animation === 'fadeBlurFromBottom') return animation_fadeBlurFromBottom;
-  if (segment.animation === 'slideLeftFadeBlur') return animation_slideLeftFadeBlur;
+  if (segment.animation === 'fadeBlurFromBottom')
+    return animation_fadeBlurFromBottom;
+  if (segment.animation === 'slideLeftFadeBlur')
+    return animation_slideLeftFadeBlur;
   if (segment.animation === 'fadeFromRight') return animation_fadeFromRight;
   if (segment.animation === 'fadeFromLeft') return animation_fadeFromLeft;
   if (segment.animation === 'charByChar') return animation_charByChar;
   if (segment.animation === 'none') return animation_none;
 
   // デフォルト: 左スライド+フェード+ブラー
   return animation_slideLeftFadeBlur;
 };
 
 // HEXカラーをRGBに変換
 const hexToRgb = (hex: string) => {
   const result = /^#?([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})$/i.exec(hex);
-  return result ? {
-    r: parseInt(result[1], 16),
-    g: parseInt(result[2], 16),
-    b: parseInt(result[3], 16),
-  } : { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0 };
+  return result
+    ? {
+        r: parseInt(result[1], 16),
+        g: parseInt(result[2], 16),
+        b: parseInt(result[3], 16),
+      }
+    : { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0 };
 };
 
 // 2色間を補間
 const interpolateColor = (color1: string, color2: string, t: number) => {
   const c1 = hexToRgb(color1);
   const c2 = hexToRgb(color2);
   const r = Math.round(c1.r + (c2.r - c1.r) * t);
   const g = Math.round(c1.g + (c2.g - c1.g) * t);
   const b = Math.round(c1.b + (c2.b - c1.b) * t);
   return `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;
 };
 
 // 一文字ずつアニメーションするコンポーネント
 const CharByCharText: React.FC<{
   text: string;
   localFrame: number;
   fps: number;
-  config: any;
-  animation: any;
+  config: TelopStyleConfig;
+  animation: TelopAnimationConfig;
   duration: number;
 }> = ({ text, localFrame, fps, config, animation, duration }) => {
   const { font, textShadow } = config;
-  const charDelay = (animation as any).charDelay || 2;
+  const charDelay = animation.charDelay ?? 2;
   const chars = text.split('');
-  const fillGradient = (font as any).fillGradient;
+  const fillGradient = font.fillGradient;
   const hasFillGradient = fillGradient?.enabled;
 
   // フェードアウト用の全体opacity
   const fadeOut = animation.fadeOutDuration;
   const overallOpacity = interpolate(
     localFrame,
     [duration - fadeOut, duration],
     [1, 0],
-    { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }
+    { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' },
   );
 
   return (
     <span style={{ display: 'inline-flex', opacity: overallOpacity }}>
       {chars.map((char, index) => {
         const charFrame = localFrame - index * charDelay;
 
         const charSpring = spring({
           frame: Math.max(0, charFrame),
           fps,
           config: animation.spring,
         });
 
         const translateY = interpolate(
           charSpring,
           [0, 1],
-          [-animation.slideInDistance, 0]
+          [-animation.slideInDistance, 0],
         );
 
-        const charOpacity = interpolate(
-          charFrame,
-          [0, 4],
-          [0, 1],
-          { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }
-        );
+        const charOpacity = interpolate(charFrame, [0, 4], [0, 1], {
+          extrapolateLeft: 'clamp',
+          extrapolateRight: 'clamp',
+        });
 
         // グラデーションの場合は文字位置に応じた色を計算
         let charColor = font.color;
         if (hasFillGradient) {
           const t = chars.length > 1 ? index / (chars.length - 1) : 0;
           charColor = interpolateColor(fillGradient.start, fillGradient.end, t);
         }
 
         return (
           <span
             key={index}
             style={{
               display: 'inline-block',
               transform: `translateY(${translateY}px)`,
               opacity: charOpacity,
               fontSize: font.size,
               fontWeight: font.weight,
               fontFamily: font.family,
               fontStyle: font.style,
               textShadow: `${textShadow.offsetX}px ${textShadow.offsetY}px ${textShadow.blur}px ${textShadow.color}`,
               color: charColor,
             }}
           >
             {char === ' ' ? '\u00A0' : char}
           </span>
         );
       })}
     </span>
   );
 };
 
 export const Telop: React.FC<TelopProps> = ({ segment }) => {
   const frame = useCurrentFrame();
   const { fps, width } = useVideoConfig();
 
   // テンプレートを取得し、フォーマット別設定で上書き

-  const animation = getAnimationConfig(segment);

   const { font, background, position, textStroke, textShadow } = config;

   // テキストを改行で分割

     };
 
     // fillGradientが有効な場合はCSSグラデーションテキストを適用

commit 53e422ea2c73f116be048251838467e34bdf4fd6
Author: 増田朗空 <rokumasuda@RokuMacBook-Pro-M5.local>
Date:   Tue May 5 06:18:33 2026 +0900

    feat(telop): any 警告ゼロ化 (Phase 3-R / Codex 推奨 B4)
    
    Codex CODEX_RESUME_PHASE3R 推奨 B4 (any 警告ゼロ化) を完封実装。
    旧: 9 warnings (Telop.tsx の `(font as any).fillGradient` 等の escape) +
        2 errors (tsc unused vars、別 commit で fix 済み)
    新: 0 warnings + 0 errors → npm run lint exit 0
    
    新規:
    - template/src/テロップテンプレート/telopConfigTypes.ts:
      TelopFontConfig / TelopTextShadowConfig / TelopTextStrokeConfig /
      TelopBackgroundConfig / TelopPositionConfig / TelopHighlightConfig /
      TelopStyleConfig / TelopAnimationSpring / TelopAnimationConfig
      各 interface で telopStyles.ts の heterogeneous template / animation を
      共通型として表現、optional 欄 (fillGradient / opacity / charDelay 等) は
      `?` で declaration、escape 不要に。
    
    修正 (Telop.tsx):
    - import で telopConfigTypes を追加
    - CharByCharText props 型: `config: any, animation: any`
      → `config: TelopStyleConfig, animation: TelopAnimationConfig`
    - `(animation as any).charDelay` → `animation.charDelay ?? 2`
    - `(font as any).fillGradient` → `font.fillGradient` (3 箇所)
    - `(animation as any).slideDirection` → `animation.slideDirection`
    - `(textStroke as any).gradient` → `textStroke.gradient`
    - `(font as any).opacity` → `font.opacity ?? 1`
    - 主 component で `getTemplateConfig` 結果を `const baseConfig: TelopStyleConfig`
      と explicit annotate (literal union → 共通 interface に widening)、optional
      fillGradient/opacity 等の safe access を有効化
    
    検証 (Bash 実測、template/node_modules 入手済 with custom cache):
    - npm run lint → exit 0、stdout 空 (eslint warnings 0 + tsc errors 0)
    
    これで Roku 環境で `npm run test` / `npm run lint` 完全 pass、
    check_release_ready.sh の TS compile gate も SKIP → OK 経路に進む。
    Codex Phase 3-R 推奨 B4 完封、次 review cycle へ。
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

diff --git "a/template/src/\343\203\206\343\203\255\343\203\203\343\203\227\343\203\206\343\203\263\343\203\227\343\203\254\343\203\274\343\203\210/telopConfigTypes.ts" "b/template/src/\343\203\206\343\203\255\343\203\203\343\203\227\343\203\206\343\203\263\343\203\227\343\203\254\343\203\274\343\203\210/telopConfigTypes.ts"
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..228da94
--- /dev/null
+++ "b/template/src/\343\203\206\343\203\255\343\203\203\343\203\227\343\203\206\343\203\263\343\203\227\343\203\254\343\203\274\343\203\210/telopConfigTypes.ts"
@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+/**
+ * Phase 3-R (Codex CODEX_RESUME_PHASE3R 推奨 B4): Telop.tsx の `any` 警告 9 件を
+ * 解消するための共通型定義。telopStyles.ts の各 template / animation を構造的
+ * type で表現し、`(font as any).fillGradient` のような escape を排除する。
+ *
+ * 各 template の font/textStroke/animation は heterogeneous (一部 template
+ * のみ fillGradient / opacity / charDelay 等を持つ) ため、interface 側で
+ * `?` optional で表現し、タグ無しで安全アクセスする。
+ */
+
+export interface TelopFontConfig {
+  size: number;
+  weight: number;
+  family: string;
+  /** 'italic' or 'normal'、telopStyles.ts では `as const` で literal */
+  style: string;
+  lineHeight: number;
+  letterSpacing: number;
+  color: string;
+  /** SVG グラデーション fill (template3 / template6 のみ持つ) */
+  fillGradient?: {
+    enabled: boolean;
+    start: string;
+    end: string;
+  };
+  /** 不透明度 (template3 / template6 のみ持つ、default 1) */
+  opacity?: number;
+}
+
+export interface TelopTextShadowConfig {
+  offsetX: number;
+  offsetY: number;
+  blur: number;
+  color: string;
+}
+
+export interface TelopTextStrokeConfig {
+  width: number;
+  gradient?: {
+    start: string;
+    end: string;
+  };
+}
+
+export interface TelopBackgroundConfig {
+  enabled: boolean;
+  gradient?: string;
+  padding?: string;
+  borderRadius?: number | string;
+  backdropFilter?: string;
+  boxShadow?: string;
+  border?: string;
+}
+
+export interface TelopPositionConfig {
+  bottom: number;
+  maxWidth: string;
+  containerPadding: string;
+}
+
+export interface TelopHighlightConfig {
+  color: string;
+  glowOpacity: string;
+}
+
+export interface TelopStyleConfig {
+  name: string;
+  font: TelopFontConfig;
+  textShadow: TelopTextShadowConfig;
+  textStroke: TelopTextStrokeConfig;
+  background: TelopBackgroundConfig;
+  position: TelopPositionConfig;
+  highlight?: TelopHighlightConfig;
+}
+
+export interface TelopAnimationSpring {
+  damping: number;
+  stiffness: number;
+  mass: number;
+}
+
+export interface TelopAnimationConfig {
+  name: string;
+  fadeInDuration: number;
+  fadeOutDuration: number;
+  slideInDistance: number;
+  /** 全 animation が持つ ('up' / 'down' / 'left' / 'right'、telopStyles.ts では `as const`) */
+  slideDirection: string;
+  /** charByChar 系のみ持つ、各文字の遅延 frame */
+  charDelay?: number;
+  spring: TelopAnimationSpring;
+}

    82	
    83	  // --- emphasis 13 ---
    84	  OrangeGradation: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: 'オレンジグラデーション', Component: OrangeGradation as TelopComponent },
    85	  AkaMoji: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '赤文字', Component: AkaMoji as TelopComponent },

    91	  RedTextWhiteBg: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '赤文字白背景', Component: RedTextWhiteBg as TelopComponent },
    92	  WhiteRed: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '白赤テロップ', Component: WhiteRed as TelopComponent },
    93	  WhiteRedTeleopV2: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '白赤テロップver2', Component: WhiteRedTeleopV2 as TelopComponent },
    94	  WhiteRedShadow: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '白文字赤シャドウ', Component: WhiteRedShadow as TelopComponent },
    95	  WhiteGreen: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '白緑テロップ', Component: WhiteGreen as TelopComponent },
    96	  GreenGradation: { category: 'emphasis', displayName: '緑グラデ金シャドウ', Component: GreenGradation as TelopComponent },
    97	
    98	  // --- negative 5 ---
    99	  BlackPurpleGradation: { category: 'negative', displayName: '黒紫グラデ', Component: BlackPurpleGradation as TelopComponent },
   100	  BlackWhiteBackground: { category: 'negative', displayName: '黒文字白背景', Component: BlackWhiteBackground as TelopComponent },
   101	  NavyBlueRiitegaki: { category: 'negative', displayName: '残酷テロップ・紺', Component: NavyBlueRiitegaki as TelopComponent },

   104	} as const satisfies Record<string, TelopTemplateEntry>;
   105	
   106	export type TelopTemplateId = keyof typeof telopTemplateRegistry;
   107	
   108	// project-config.json telopStyle.{main,emphasis,negative} 既定値の displayName とのマップ:
   109	//   "白青テロップver2" → 'WhiteBlueTeleopV2'
   110	//   "オレンジグラデーション" → 'OrangeGradation'
   111	//   "黒紫グラデ" → 'BlackPurpleGradation'
   112	// supermovie-init / supermovie-subtitles から逆引きする時はこの helper を使う
   113	export function findTemplateIdByDisplayName(displayName: string): TelopTemplateId | undefined {
   114	  const entries = Object.entries(telopTemplateRegistry) as [TelopTemplateId, TelopTemplateEntry][];
   115	  return entries.find(([, v]) => v.displayName === displayName)?.[0];
   116	}
   117	
   118	export function listTemplatesByCategory(category: TelopCategory): TelopTemplateId[] {
   119	  const entries = Object.entries(telopTemplateRegistry) as [TelopTemplateId, TelopTemplateEntry][];
   120	  return entries.filter(([, v]) => v.category === category).map(([k]) => k);
   121	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import React, { useMemo } from 'react';
     2	import { AbsoluteFill, useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig } from 'remotion';
     3	import { Telop } from './Telop';
     4	import { telopData } from './telopData';
     5	import {
     6	  telopTemplateRegistry,
     7	  type SubtitleData,
     8	  type SubtitleItem,
     9	  type TelopTemplateId,
    10	} from './telopTemplateRegistry';
    11	import type { TelopSegment } from './telopTypes';
    12	
    13	/**
    14	 * registry render 経由で動かすかどうかは segment.templateId の有無で判断する。
    15	 * - templateId が指定されている: registry の Component を SubtitleData 形式で呼び出す
    16	 * - 指定なし: 既存 Telop.tsx (legacy template={1..6} 分岐) で描画
    17	 *
    18	 * registry Component は subtitleData に複数 SubtitleItem を含めることができるが、
    19	 * TelopPlayer は時刻同期で 1 segment ずつ描画する設計なので、毎 frame で
    20	 * `current` の SubtitleItem 1 件を含む subtitleData を生成して渡す。
    21	 */
    22	function segmentToSubtitleItem(segment: TelopSegment, fps: number): SubtitleItem {
    23	  const startSec = segment.startFrame / fps;
    24	  const endSec = segment.endFrame / fps;
    25	  const lines = segment.text.split('\n');
    26	  return {
    27	    text: segment.text,
    28	    lines,
    29	    start: startSec,
    30	    end: endSec,
    31	    startFrame: segment.startFrame,
    32	    endFrame: segment.endFrame,
    33	  };
    34	}
    35	
    36	export const TelopPlayer: React.FC = () => {
    37	  const frame = useCurrentFrame();
    38	  const { fps } = useVideoConfig();
    39	
    40	  const current = useMemo(
    41	    () => telopData.find((s) => frame >= s.startFrame && frame < s.endFrame),
    42	    [frame],
    43	  );
    44	
    45	  if (!current) {
    46	    return <AbsoluteFill />;
    47	  }
    48	
    49	  // registry 経路 (新)
    50	  const tplId = (current as TelopSegment).templateId as TelopTemplateId | undefined;
    51	  if (tplId && telopTemplateRegistry[tplId]) {
    52	    const Entry = telopTemplateRegistry[tplId];
    53	    const subtitleData: SubtitleData = {
    54	      fps,
    55	      subtitles: [segmentToSubtitleItem(current, fps)],
    56	    };
    57	    const Component = Entry.Component;
    58	    return (
    59	      <AbsoluteFill>
    60	        <Component subtitleData={subtitleData} />
    61	      </AbsoluteFill>
    62	    );
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  // legacy 経路 (旧 Telop.tsx)
    66	  return (
    67	    <AbsoluteFill>
    68	      <Telop segment={current} />
    69	    </AbsoluteFill>
    70	  );
    71	};

   183	
   184	(更新: 2026-05-05_06:18、source=HEAD、`scripts/regen_phase3_progress.sh` で auto-gen。
   185	本 script で regen → docs commit する形のため、docs 上の commit chain は
   186	docs commit を作る前の HEAD を反映する設計 (off-by-one は intrinsic、
   187	`--verify` mode で count drift を CI 検査可)。)
   188	
   189	## Test gates
   190	
   191	```bash
   192	cd <PROJECT> (template から copy された実 project)
   193	npm run test           # eslint + tsc + pure python integration smoke
   194	npm run test:timeline  # pure python integration smoke 単独 (engine 不要、CI 高頻度可)
   195	npm run visual-smoke   # 実 main.mp4 + node_modules 必要、3 format × 2 frame still
   196	```
   197	
   198	`test:timeline` は **20 test ケース** (Phase 3-A〜3-O 累積、最新 aacc5dc 時点) で
   199	timeline.py / 4 script の連鎖を engine 不要で高速検証 (新規 commit 後の regression
   200	早期検出用)。test 一覧は `scripts/test_timeline_integration.py` の `main()` 末尾参照。

    74	 succeeded in 0ms:
    75	---
    76	name: verification-gate
    77	description: 事実主張を含む応答を組み立てる前に必ず起動する Citation 強制 skill。Anthropic 公式 reduce hallucinations docs の「主張 → 引用検索 → 引用なし主張削除 + [] マーカー」フォーマットに従う。「分析して」「教えて」「まとめて」「報告して」「結論は」「現状は」「データは」「件数は」「いつ」「誰が」「どこで」「いくら」等の事実主張要求が来た時に即起動。Roku の「虚偽多すぎる」指摘 (2026-04-29) を起点とする構造的予防策の Layer 4。一次防衛は CLAUDE.md HARD RULE + UserPromptSubmit hook、本 skill は補強層
    78	---
    79	
    80	# Verification Gate
    81	
    82	このskillはAnthropic公式 reduce hallucinations docs の「Citations フォーマット強制」パターンを skill 化したもの。
    83	
    84	## 発動タイミング
    85	
    86	ユーザーが事実主張・分析・報告・推論を求めた時:
    87	
    88	- 「分析して」「教えて」「まとめて」「報告して」「調べて」
    89	- 「結論は」「現状は」「データは」「状況は」
    90	- 「件数は」「いつ」「誰が」「どこで」「いくら」「どのくらい」
    91	- 「効果は」「結果は」「影響は」
    92	- 過去状態・他者行動結果・外部システム状態への言及を含む応答
    93	
    94	## Phase 1: 主張のリストアップ (内部処理)
    95	
    96	ドラフト応答を組み立てる前に、含まれる主張を箇条書きで内部抽出する。
    97	
    98	事実主張の定義:
    99	- 数値 (件数・金額・%・時間・人数 等)
   100	- 人物名・案件名・固有名詞
   101	- 日時・予定・期日
   102	- 他者の行動結果 (送信した・反映した・実行した 等)
   103	- 外部システムの状態 (DB に N 件・ファイルに〜と書いてある 等)
   104	- 状態評価 (動いている・壊れている・効果あった 等)
   105	
   106	## Phase 2: 各主張に対する根拠取得
   107	
   108	各主張について、必ず以下のいずれかで根拠を取得する:
   109	
   110	| 主張のタイプ | 取得手段 | 引用フォーマット |
   111	|---|---|---|
   112	| ファイルの記述 | Read | `(file_path:line_number)` |
   113	| Chatwork メッセージ | `mcp__chatwork__get_message_detail` | `(get_message_detail で取得, msg_id=...)` |
   114	| Gmail スレッド | `mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__get_thread` | `(get_thread で取得, thread_id=...)` |
   115	| Notion ページ | `mcp__hugruma-notion__API-retrieve-a-page` 等 | `(retrieve-a-page で取得)` |
   116	| カレンダー予定 | `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Calendar__list_events` | `(list_events で取得)` |
   117	| Web 公式ドキュメント | WebFetch | `(出典 URL)` |
   118	| Git 状態 | Bash で `git log` `git show` `git diff` | `(Bash 実測)` |
   119	| 過去のユーザー発言 | 会話履歴の原文引用 | `(Roku 発言: "原文")` |
   120	| 上記いずれも不可 | 主張を削除 | `[未検証]` または `[不明]` マーカー |
   121	
   122	## Phase 3: 引用なし主張の削除
   123	
   124	根拠取得に失敗した主張は応答から削除し、削除位置に `[未検証]` または `[不明]` を残す。
   125	
   126	例:
   127	- Before: `この機能は3日で実装できます。`
   128	- After: `この機能の実装期間は [未検証] です。`
   129	
   130	## Phase 4: 残った主張のみで応答を再構成
   131	
   132	引用付き主張のみで応答を組み立てる。引用がない主張は構造的に書けない。
   133	
   134	## 限界
   135	
   136	skill 自動起動忘れの可能性あり。
   137	
   138	- 一次防衛 (確実): CLAUDE.md HARD RULE (Layer 1) + UserPromptSubmit hook 全ターン無条件注入 (Layer 2)
   139	- 本 skill は補強層 (Layer 4)
   140	- skill が起動しなくても Layer 1+2 が常時作動する設計
   141	
   142	## 出典・関連
   143	
   144	- Anthropic 公式 reduce hallucinations: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/test-and-evaluate/strengthen-guardrails/reduce-hallucinations
   145	- 設計プラン: `~/.claude/plans/hallucination-prevention-overhaul.md` Layer 4
   146	- 関連 feedback: `feedback_citation_enforcement.md` `feedback_structural_deception.md` `feedback_no_fake_knowledge_reference.md`
   147

   173	#!/usr/bin/env bash
   174	# Phase 3 release readiness composite gate.
   175	# 全 self-driveable check を 1 commands で走らせ、Codex review が release-ready
   176	# 判定するための前提状態を verify。
   177	#
   178	# Usage:
   179	#   bash scripts/check_release_ready.sh
   180	#
   181	# Exit codes:
   182	#   0 = release-ready (全 gate pass)
   183	#   1 = doc drift (regen --verify fail)
   184	#   2 = integration test fail
   185	#   3 = worktree dirty
   186	#   4 = unknown env (git / python3 不在)
   187	#
   188	# 走らせる gate:
   189	#   1. git rev-parse / python3 / bash 環境チェック
   190	#   2. worktree clean (untracked / modified なし)
   191	#   3. scripts/regen_phase3_progress.sh --verify
   192	#   4. python3 template/scripts/test_timeline_integration.py
   193	#
   194	# 走らせない gate (要 npm install / 実 project):
   195	#   - npm run lint (eslint + tsc)
   196	#   - npm run visual-smoke (実 main.mp4 必要)
   197	#   - render e2e
   198	set -uo pipefail
   199	
   200	REPO_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
   201	cd "$REPO_DIR"
   202	
   203	echo "=== Phase 3 release readiness gate ==="
   204	echo "repo: $REPO_DIR"
   205	echo "head: $(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
   206	echo
   207	
   208	# 1. 環境チェック
   209	for tool in git python3; do
   210	    if ! command -v "$tool" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   211	        echo "  [FAIL] env: $tool not found"
   212	        exit 4
   213	    fi
   214	done
   215	echo "  [OK]   env: git + python3 available"
   216	
   217	# 2. worktree clean
   218	if ! git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
   219	    echo "  [FAIL] worktree: modified files present"
   220	    git status --short
   221	    exit 3
   222	fi
   223	UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | head -5)
   224	if [ -n "$UNTRACKED" ]; then
   225	    echo "  [FAIL] worktree: untracked files present:"
   226	    echo "$UNTRACKED" | sed 's/^/    /'
   227	    exit 3
   228	fi
   229	echo "  [OK]   worktree: clean"
   230	
   231	# 3. regen --verify (doc drift)
   232	echo
   233	echo "--- regen verify ---"
   234	if ! bash "$REPO_DIR/scripts/regen_phase3_progress.sh" --verify; then
   235	    echo "  [FAIL] regen --verify failed"
   236	    exit 1
   237	fi
   238	echo "  [OK]   regen --verify pass"
   239	
   240	# 4. integration smoke test
   241	echo
   242	echo "--- integration smoke test ---"
   243	TEST_LOG=$(mktemp)
   244	if python3 "$REPO_DIR/template/scripts/test_timeline_integration.py" > "$TEST_LOG" 2>&1; then
   245	    PASS_LINE=$(grep -E "^Result: " "$TEST_LOG" | tail -1)
   246	    echo "  [OK]   $PASS_LINE"
   247	    rm -f "$TEST_LOG"
   248	else
   249	    echo "  [FAIL] integration test failed:"
   250	    tail -20 "$TEST_LOG" | sed 's/^/    /'
   251	    rm -f "$TEST_LOG"
   252	    exit 2
   253	fi
   254	
   255	echo
   256	echo "=== ALL GATES PASS ==="
   257	echo "release-ready: yes (technical readiness only、Roku 判断領域は別途)"
   258	echo "  - PR / merge 戦略 (1 PR squash 推奨、Codex)"
   259	echo "  - 実 project visual-smoke / render e2e (main.mp4 fixture 必要)"
   260	echo "  - npm run lint (要 npm install、Roku 環境で再実行推奨)"
   261	exit 0
   262
